info.title: Whirlpool PDI Tool API
info.description: Whirlpool PDI Tool API APIs developed by Scopt Analytics.

429.description: Too many authentication attempts from this IP.

post.description: Login using SSO exchange token (Okta)

429.description: Too many authentication attempts from this IP.

post.description: Starts a password reset for non-superadmin active users. Always returns the same success message to prevent email enumeration. When APP_ENV=dev, `debug.email_sent` and `debug.is_disallowed` indicate whether a token was issued and email queued. Subject to auth rate limiting and forgot-password IP blocking (12h after too many requests).

200.description: Request accepted. Response message is always the same whether or not an account exists. In dev, use `debug.email_sent` and `debug.is_disallowed` to inspect the outcome.

422.description: Request body failed Pydantic validation (e.g. invalid email format). Parse `error` for a summary and `details` for field-level messages.

429.description: Rate limited. Either auth route attempts exceeded (AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_*) or forgot-password IP block (FORGOT_PASSWORD_*). Read `detail` and Retry-After header.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until this IP may call auth routes again.

X-Attempt-Remaining.description: Auth attempts remaining for this IP in the current window.

post.description: Sets a new password using the token from the forgot-password email link. Validates password strength with zxcvbn (score >= 3). Revokes all active sessions for the user on success.

200.description: Password updated. All user sessions revoked; user must log in again.

400.description: Reset token is invalid, expired, already used, or belongs to a disallowed account (e.g. superadmin).

422.description: Validation failed. Malformed JSON body returns { success, error, details }. Password mismatch or weak password (zxcvbn score < 3) returns { detail }.

429.description: Too many auth attempts from this IP (shared auth rate limiter).

Retry-After.description: Seconds until this IP may call auth routes again.

X-Attempt-Remaining.description: Auth attempts remaining for this IP in the current window.

get.description:
Returns deploy release notes from `release.json` for authenticated dashboard users.

**React usage**
- Call with `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`.
- Response field names are snake_case (`released_at`); map to camelCase in the UI (`releasedAt`).
- Render `notes[]` as the release table: `version`, `released_at`, `title`, feature count.
- Detail dialog: `title`, `version`, `released_at`, and `features[]` with `text`, optional `type` badge, optional `hash`.
- `features[].type` is one of: `feature`, `fix`, `improvement`, `chore` (or omitted).
- Notes are ordered newest first.

**Auth errors**
- `401` missing/invalid token
- `403` password change required (same as other `/api/*` routes)

403.description: Password change required before using the application.

post.description: Sends a one-time verification code to the authenticated user's email. Required before POST /auth/change-password when CHANGE_PASSWORD_ONBOARDING_OTP_REQUIRED (first login / forced rotation) or CHANGE_PASSWORD_OTP_REQUIRED (voluntary account password change) is enabled.

Authenticated password change for onboarding temp passwords and periodic rotation. Validates zxcvbn strength and rejects reuse of the current or last 3 passwords. After onboarding (must_change_password=false), email OTP is required by default — call POST /auth/change-password/request-otp first. First login after onboard (must_change_password=true) skips OTP unless CHANGE_PASSWORD_ONBOARDING_OTP_REQUIRED=true. Clears must_change_password and password_expired flags.

401.description: Current password or OTP is incorrect.

422.description: Validation failed, weak password, or password reuse.

get.description: List active devices for the current user

post.description: Keep selected devices and deregister the rest of the active devices
Deregister a device and revoke all its sessions

post.description: Creates an active user with hashed password and facility scope. Roles allowed: operator, manager, biz-admin. Does not send a welcome email — call POST /api/users/{user_uuid}/onboard after creation to email a temporary password and login URL.

409.description: Email or mobile number already in use.

get.description: Downloads a CSV with columns Name, Email, Mobile, Role, Designation, and Allowed Warehouse (pipe-separated codes). Existing non-superadmin users are included so the file can be edited and re-uploaded to upsert.

200.description: CSV file containing the template header and existing users.

post.description: Creates or updates users matched by email. Does not send onboarding emails. New users receive a random password and must_change_password=true until POST /api/users/{user_uuid}/onboard is called separately. Role values: Admin (maps to Biz Admin), Manager, Operator. Superadmin cannot be added via CSV. Allowed Warehouse uses pipe-separated warehouse codes (for example RI52|RI62). The response lists created/updated users, rejected rows with reasons, and rejected_csv for download and re-upload after fixes.

200.description: Upsert summary with accepted and rejected rows.

400.description: Invalid CSV file or missing required headers.

422.description: Unknown warehouse code or invalid CSV headers.

post.description: Superadmin-only: generates a new temporary password for an existing user, sets must_change_password, and sends a welcome email with the login URL and temporary credentials. For first-time users without a VPN profile, provisions VPN access and attaches the WireGuard config and QR code with setup instructions. The user must change their password on first login before accessing the application. Safe to call again to resend onboarding email with a fresh temporary password.

parameters.name: user_uuid

schema.description: User UUID from POST /api/users.
schema.title: User Uuid

parameters.description: User UUID from POST /api/users.

403.description: Target user is superadmin or inactive.

post.description: Provisions one VPN device for the user via the VPN provision service. Replacing an existing profile revokes the old device first. Requires VPN_PROVISION_SERVER and VPN_PROVISION_KEY.

get.description: Returns the WireGuard config file for the user's provisioned device. Response body and Content-Type come from the VPN provision server.

put.description: Partial update: send only fields to change. Set is_active to false to deactivate; VPN is revoked automatically. Superadmin accounts cannot be edited.

post.description: Test AWS S3 connectivity using saved credentials or an optional request body
Send a test email using saved SMTP settings or an optional smtp override. On failure, error_trace contains the full stack trace for the UI.
Gateway SMTP test matching swaks: --port 25 --tls --tls-verify with no auth. Uses subject/body 'SMTP TLS verification test'. Provide host/from_email or saved SMTP.

Approves active inspections still in PENDING or IN_REVIEW when created more than AUTO_APPROVE_INSPECTION_HOURS ago (default 6). Sets is_auto_approved and reviewed_comment. Also runs every 15 minutes via Celery beat when the worker uses --beat.

parameters.name: x-job-execute-token

schema.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.
schema.title: X-Job-Execute-Token

parameters.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.

get.summary: Enqueue IP geolocation lookups for unresolved addresses
get.description: Scans login audit logs for client IPs, ensures rows exist in ip_address_metadata, and enqueues Celery resolve_ip_metadata tasks for pending or failed lookups (batch size IP_GEO_BATCH_LIMIT). Also runs on a Celery beat schedule when the worker uses --beat.

parameters.name: x-job-execute-token

schema.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.
schema.title: X-Job-Execute-Token

parameters.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.

get.summary: Send welcome onboarding emails to pending users
get.description: Finds active non-superadmin users with must_change_password=true and no onboard_email_sent_at (for example after CSV bulk import). Processes users one at a time with direct SMTP delivery and up to 3 retries per email. When Celery is configured, work is queued to the worker; otherwise the job runs inline in this request.

parameters.name: x-job-execute-token

schema.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.

parameters.description: Shared secret from JOB_EXECUTE_TOKEN env var.

200.description: Bulk onboard email job result or enqueue acknowledgement.

get.description: Returns the 50 most recently created tasks, newest first. Optional filters: task_type, status (see GET /api/tasks/filters).

schema.description: Filter by task_type (e.g. send_email).
schema.title: Task Type

parameters.description: Filter by task_type (e.g. send_email).

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status: queued, processing, completed, failed, retrying, cancelled.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status: queued, processing, completed, failed, retrying, cancelled.

get.description: Returns task_type values for segmented filter tabs on the Tasks page. Pass value to GET /api/tasks?task_type=.

post.summary: Queue a sample send_email background task
post.description: Uses configured SMTP credentials (credential_key default_smtp) and returns task_uuid immediately.

get.summary: Get background task status and result
get.description: Returns task status, timing, result flags, and display_fields as tagged rows for React detail screens.

source.title: Source
source.description: AUTH, USER ADD, USER ONBOARD, USER UPDATE, MASTER UPDATE, INTEGRATION KEY UPDATED, or EMAIL.

details.title: Details
details.description: Structured audit payload. Email logs include to_email, subject, body_text, and body_html for SuperAdmin debugging.

details.title: Details
details.description: Pydantic validation error objects (loc, msg, type, …).

examples.msg: value is not a valid email address

AuthRequestValidationErrorResponse.title: AuthRequestValidationErrorResponse
AuthRequestValidationErrorResponse.description: Body validation errors from the global RequestValidationError handler.

file.title: File
file.description: UTF-8 CSV file with header row. Required columns: Name, Email, Mobile, Role, Designation, Allowed Warehouse. Role must be one of: Admin (maps to biz-admin), Manager, Operator. Allowed Warehouse is pipe-separated (for example RI52|RI62). Superadmin cannot be imported. Extra columns are ignored.

welcome_email_sent.title: Welcome Email Sent
welcome_email_sent.description: True when the welcome onboarding email was delivered.

error.title: Error
error.description: Present when onboarding or email delivery failed.

BulkOnboardEmailItemResponse.title: BulkOnboardEmailItemResponse
BulkOnboardEmailItemResponse.description: Per-user result when GET /jobs/bulk-onboard-emails runs inline.

pending_count.title: Pending Count
pending_count.description: Users matched for onboarding at job start.

failed_count.title: Failed Count
failed_count.description: Users that failed onboarding or email delivery.

logged.title: Logged
logged.description: True when a row was written to job_logs.

enqueued.title: Enqueued
enqueued.description: True when processing was queued to Celery. When true, results is empty and sent_count/failed_count stay 0 until the worker finishes.

results.title: Results
results.description: Per-user outcomes when the job ran inline (enqueued=false).

examples.message: Bulk onboard emails finished: 23 sent, 2 failed, 25 pending at start.

results.error: Welcome email delivery failed after retries
results.name: Bad User

otp_required.title: Otp Required
otp_required.description: Dev-only: whether OTP is required for this user right now.

email_sent.title: Email Sent
email_sent.description: Dev-only: whether the OTP email was queued or sent.

message.title: Message
examples: Verification code sent to your email

otp_required.title: Otp Required
otp_required.description: False when CHANGE_PASSWORD_*_OTP_REQUIRED is disabled for this user.

current_password.title: Current Password
current_password.description: Existing password (temporary password on first login).

new_password.title: New Password
new_password.description: New password. Validated with zxcvbn (minimum score 3).

otp_code.title: Otp Code
otp_code.description: Email verification code from POST /auth/change-password/request-otp. Required when CHANGE_PASSWORD_ONBOARDING_OTP_REQUIRED or CHANGE_PASSWORD_OTP_REQUIRED is enabled.

message.title: Message
message.description: Password was updated. User may access the application.

image_urls.title: Image Urls
image_urls.description: Layer inspection photos as fully qualified URLs; set on full inspection responses, empty on parse-barcode and other lightweight payloads.

defect_count.title: Defect Count
defect_count.description: Inspections with this damage grading in scope.

pct_contribution.title: Pct Contribution
pct_contribution.description: Share of graded defects for this grading (percent).

total_defects.title: Total Defects
total_defects.description: Inspections with any damage grading in scope.

items.title: Items
items.description: One row per grading (DGR, LDGR, SCRAP).

defect_count.title: Defect Count
defect_count.description: Count of checklist answers marked NO in this section.

pct_contribution.title: Pct Contribution
pct_contribution.description: Share of total defects for this section (percent).

within_pareto_80.title: Within Pareto 80
within_pareto_80.description: True when this section is part of the vital few near 80% of defects.

total_defects.title: Total Defects
total_defects.description: Total checklist NO responses across all sections.

items.title: Items
items.description: Sections sorted by defect count descending.

DefectsParetoChartResponse.title: DefectsParetoChartResponse
DefectsParetoChartResponse.description: Defect pareto chart by checklist section.

total_inspections.title: Total Inspections
total_inspections.description: Inbound inspections for this plant in scope.

defective_pct.title: Defective Pct
defective_pct.description: Defective inspections divided by total inspections (percent).

grading_defects.description: Defect counts split by damage grading.

items.title: Items
items.description: All active plants, including rows with zero inspections.

DefectsPlantResponse.title: DefectsPlantResponse
DefectsPlantResponse.description: Defect table rows for every active plant.

total_inspections.title: Total Inspections
total_inspections.description: Inspections for this truck in scope.

defective_pct.title: Defective Pct
defective_pct.description: Defective inspections divided by total inspections (percent).

items.title: Items
items.description: One row per truck number with inspections in scope.

DefectsTruckResponse.title: DefectsTruckResponse
DefectsTruckResponse.description: Defect stats grouped by truck number.

total_inspections.title: Total Inspections
total_inspections.description: Inspections for this warehouse in scope.

defective_pct.title: Defective Pct
defective_pct.description: Defective inspections divided by total inspections (percent).

warehouse_induced_defect_pct.title: Warehouse Induced Defect Pct
warehouse_induced_defect_pct.description: Inbound approved inspections that later failed outbound for the same serial number, divided by inbound approved count (percent).

grading_defects.description: Defect counts split by damage grading.

items.title: Items
items.description: All active warehouses, including rows with zero inspections.

DefectsWarehouseResponse.title: DefectsWarehouseResponse
DefectsWarehouseResponse.description: Defect table rows for every active warehouse.

inspection_volume.title: Inspection Volume
inspection_volume.description: Total inspections matching filters and inspection type.

damaged_inspections.title: Damaged Inspections
damaged_inspections.description: Inspections with any recorded damage fields.

defect_rate_pct.title: Defect Rate Pct
defect_rate_pct.description: Damaged inspections divided by inspection volume (percent).

pending_approvals.title: Pending Approvals
pending_approvals.description: Inspections in PENDING or IN_REVIEW status.

value.title: Value
value.description: Pass as the list endpoint filter query value.

label.title: Label
label.description: Display label for segmented filter tabs.

email_sent.title: Email Sent
email_sent.description: True when a reset email was queued or sent. False when the account cannot reset (unknown, superadmin, inactive) or SMTP is unavailable.

is_disallowed.title: Is Disallowed
is_disallowed.description: True when no reset token was issued and the verification flow was not started (superadmin, unknown user, inactive, invalid role).

email.title: Email
email.description: Account email. Superadmin accounts cannot use self-service reset.

message.title: Message
message.description: Always returned for every request to avoid email enumeration. Check debug.email_sent / debug.is_disallowed in dev to inspect outcome.

debug.description: Dev-only diagnostic block (APP_ENV=dev). Omitted in production. Use email_sent and is_disallowed to drive UI toasts without leaking tokens.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Human-readable error message for the UI.
examples: Invalid or expired password reset link

scans_total.title: Scans Total
scans_total.description: Inspections created in the range. Operator: own scans. Manager / superadmin: all scans in warehouse scope.

scans_in_review.title: Scans In Review
scans_in_review.description: PENDING or IN_REVIEW with created_at in range. Operator: own inspections. Manager / superadmin: any in warehouse scope.

scans_approved.title: Scans Approved
scans_approved.description: APPROVED with reviewed_at in range. Operator: their inspections. Manager: rows they reviewed. Superadmin: all approved decisions in scope.

scans_rejected.title: Scans Rejected
scans_rejected.description: REJECTED with reviewed_at in range. Operator / manager same as scans_approved; superadmin: all rejections in scope.

InspectionAnalyticsKpis.title: InspectionAnalyticsKpis
InspectionAnalyticsKpis.description: Role-aware analytics for the Data Analytics screen (same date window for all four).

InspectionFullResponse.title: InspectionFullResponse
InspectionFullResponse.description: Detail row plus checklist inputs, images, and pass/fail counts (parse-barcode parity).

InspectionImageUploadResponse.title: InspectionImageUploadResponse
InspectionImageUploadResponse.description: Stored path for persistence plus an embeddable URL for immediate preview.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total rows matching filters across all pages.

per_page.title: Per Page
per_page.description: Page size used for this response.

total_pages.title: Total Pages
total_pages.description: Total pages available for the current filters.

data.title: Data
data.description: Inspection rows for the current page.

barcode.title: Barcode
barcode.description: Product unit barcode (16-char scan id when registered).

inspection_serial_number.title: Inspection Serial Number
inspection_serial_number.description: Serial captured on the inspection (may differ from barcode payload).

InspectionProductForPrint.title: InspectionProductForPrint
InspectionProductForPrint.description: Product unit + product fields commonly needed on printed inspection slips.

rows_updated.title: Rows Updated
rows_updated.description: Number of database rows changed by this run.

logged.title: Logged
logged.description: True when a row was written to job_logs (failures or at least one row updated).

JobExecutionResponse.title: JobExecutionResponse
JobExecutionResponse.description: Result of a cron-triggered GET job.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Structured context (task_uuid, thresholds, login correlation, etc.).

users.title: Users
users.description: Active users (value is user id, label is name and email).

KpiParametersResponse.title: KpiParametersResponse
KpiParametersResponse.description: Filter dropdown options for report screens.

attempted_email.title: Attempted Email
attempted_email.description: Email submitted at login time (including failed attempts).

login_method.title: Login Method
login_method.description: Authentication method, e.g. password or SSO token exchange.

failure_reason.title: Failure Reason
failure_reason.description: Present when status is failed; explains why login was rejected.

ip_address.title: Ip Address
ip_address.description: Client IP captured from the login request.

proxy_ip_address.title: Proxy Ip Address
proxy_ip_address.description: Raw X-Forwarded-For value when the request passed through a proxy.

ip_metadata.description: Cached geolocation for ip_address from ip_address_metadata.

external_links.description: Ready-to-open AbuseIPDB and IPinfo URLs for ip_address. Null when this login row has no client IP.

device_info.title: Device Info
device_info.description: JSON object with device / browser info from PWA (userAgent, platform, etc.)

recent_logins.title: Recent Logins
recent_logins.description: Up to 100 most recent login events from this IP.

recent_users.title: Recent Users
recent_users.description: Up to 10 distinct users by most recent login from this IP.

metadata_refresh_queued.title: Metadata Refresh Queued
metadata_refresh_queued.description: True when this request queued a background resolve_ip_metadata task. Poll again after a few seconds for updated country/ISP fields.

abuseipdb.title: Abuseipdb
abuseipdb.description: AbuseIPDB check URL for this IP. Open in a new browser tab to view abuse reports, confidence score, and ISP/country summary.

ipinfo.title: Ipinfo
ipinfo.description: IPinfo lookup URL for this IP. Open in a new browser tab to view geolocation, ASN, company, and hosted domains.

LoginIpExternalLinksResponse.title: LoginIpExternalLinksResponse
LoginIpExternalLinksResponse.description: Third-party pages to manually investigate a client IP address.

health_status.title: Health Status
health_status.description: healthy, suspicious, or abusive based on login patterns for this IP.

ip_metadata.description: Cached geolocation for this IP from ip_address_metadata.

is_abusive.title: Is Abusive
is_abusive.description: True when the IP matches one or more suspicious-login heuristics.

abusive_reasons.title: Abusive Reasons
abusive_reasons.description: Heuristic codes when is_abusive is true: high_failed_attempts, high_failure_rate, high_volume_suspicious, or only_failures.

external_links.description: Third-party URLs to manually investigate this IP on AbuseIPDB and IPinfo.

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code when lookup completed.

country_name.title: Country Name
country_name.description: Human-readable country name when lookup completed.

region.title: Region
region.description: Region or state name from the geo provider.

city.title: City
city.description: City name from the geo provider.

isp.title: Isp
isp.description: Internet service provider or organization name.

lookup_status.title: Lookup Status
lookup_status.description: Geo lookup state: pending (queued), completed, failed, or skipped (private/local IP).

LoginIpMetadataResponse.title: LoginIpMetadataResponse
LoginIpMetadataResponse.description: Geolocation and ISP data resolved asynchronously for a client IP.

login_count.title: Login Count
login_count.description: Number of login events from this IP for this user.

ip_address.title: Ip Address
ip_address.description: Distinct client IP aggregated from login audit logs.

ip_metadata.description: Cached geolocation for this IP from ip_address_metadata.

is_abusive.title: Is Abusive
is_abusive.description: True when the IP matches one or more suspicious-login heuristics.

abusive_reasons.title: Abusive Reasons
abusive_reasons.description: Heuristic codes when is_abusive is true: high_failed_attempts, high_failure_rate, high_volume_suspicious, or only_failures.

external_links.description: Third-party URLs to manually investigate this IP on AbuseIPDB and IPinfo.

attempted_email.title: Attempted Email
attempted_email.description: Email submitted at login time (including failed attempts).

login_method.title: Login Method
login_method.description: Authentication method, e.g. password or SSO token exchange.

failure_reason.title: Failure Reason
failure_reason.description: Present when status is failed; explains why login was rejected.

ip_address.title: Ip Address
ip_address.description: Client IP captured from the login request.

proxy_ip_address.title: Proxy Ip Address
proxy_ip_address.description: Raw X-Forwarded-For value when the request passed through a proxy.

ip_metadata.description: Cached geolocation for ip_address from ip_address_metadata.

external_links.description: Ready-to-open AbuseIPDB and IPinfo URLs for ip_address. Null when this login row has no client IP.

allowed_warehouses.title: Allowed Warehouses
allowed_warehouses.description: Warehouse codes the user may access; null for superadmin.

must_change_password.title: Must Change Password
must_change_password.description: True when the user must change their password (onboarding temp password or missing password_changed_at). Frontend should route to change-password.

password_expired.title: Password Expired
password_expired.description: True when PASSWORD_MAX_AGE_DAYS elapsed since password_changed_at. Frontend should route to change-password.

change_password_otp_required.title: Change Password Otp Required
change_password_otp_required.description: True when POST /auth/change-password requires an email OTP. False on first login (must_change_password); true after onboarding when CHANGE_PASSWORD_OTP_REQUIRED is enabled (default true).

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Short-lived SSO exchange token from the Okta callback redirect

review_queue.title: Review Queue
review_queue.description: Inbound in_review plus outbound in_review (each counts PENDING and IN_REVIEW). Same as all_inspections.in_review when inspections are only inbound or outbound.

ManagerInspectionTeamKpisResponse.title: ManagerInspectionTeamKpisResponse
ManagerInspectionTeamKpisResponse.description: Manager Team tab: reporting window and queue-oriented counts.

in_review.title: In Review
in_review.description: Inspections in PENDING or IN_REVIEW (any direction).

ManagerTeamInspectionAllKpis.title: ManagerTeamInspectionAllKpis
ManagerTeamInspectionAllKpis.description: All inspections in the reporting window (manager warehouse scope).

in_review.title: In Review
in_review.description: Inspections in PENDING or IN_REVIEW for this direction.

ManagerTeamInspectionDirectionKpis.title: ManagerTeamInspectionDirectionKpis
ManagerTeamInspectionDirectionKpis.description: Inbound or outbound slice for the manager team overview.

date_from.title: Date From
date_from.description: Inclusive UTC start date for the reporting window.

date_to.title: Date To
date_to.description: Inclusive UTC end date for the reporting window.

type.description: Master inspection direction filter. Use inbound or outbound.

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.description: Warehouse ids from GET /api/reports/kpi-parameters. Empty array means all warehouses.

plant.title: Plant
plant.description: Plant ids from GET /api/reports/kpi-parameters. Inbound only. Empty array means all plants.

product_category.title: Product Category
product_category.description: Product category pair keys as "category_type|sub_category_type" (same as KPI parameters value). Empty array means all categories.

grading.description: Optional damage grading filter (DGR, LDGR, SCRAP).

OperationsAnalyticsRequest.title: OperationsAnalyticsRequest
OperationsAnalyticsRequest.description: Shared filter body for report analytics POST endpoints.

in_review.title: In Review
in_review.description: Inspections where the authenticated user is ``inspector_id``, in PENDING or IN_REVIEW for this direction.

approved.title: Approved
approved.description: Owner inspections with ``created_at`` in the window and review status APPROVED.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.description: Owner inspections with ``created_at`` in the window and review status REJECTED.

OperatorInspectionDirectionKpis.title: OperatorInspectionDirectionKpis
OperatorInspectionDirectionKpis.description: Inbound or outbound slice for the operator Data Analytics view.

review_queue.title: Review Queue
review_queue.description: Inbound in_review plus outbound in_review for inspections where the operator is ``inspector_id``.

OperatorInspectionKpisResponse.title: OperatorInspectionKpisResponse
OperatorInspectionKpisResponse.description: Operator Data Analytics: status breakdown by direction for owned inspections only.

user_uuid.title: User Uuid
user_uuid.description: Linked user when the email matched an account.

ip_address.title: Ip Address
ip_address.description: Client IP observed on the forgot-password request.

is_completed.title: Is Completed
is_completed.description: True when the user completed POST /auth/reset-password with this token.

is_disallowed.title: Is Disallowed
is_disallowed.description: True when no token was issued (superadmin, unknown user, inactive, invalid role, or IP already blocked).

email_sent.title: Email Sent
email_sent.description: True when a reset email was queued or sent for this request.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total rows matching filters across all pages.

per_page.title: Per Page
per_page.description: Page size used for this response.

total_pages.title: Total Pages
total_pages.description: Total pages available for the current filters.

text.title: Text
text.description: Human-readable change description for the UI list.

type.title: Type
type.description: Optional badge type for React pills: feature, fix, improvement, or chore. Omit or null when the source commit had no [feature]/[fix]/… tag.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Short git commit hash (deploy-generated entries). Optional.

ReleaseFeatureResponse.title: ReleaseFeatureResponse
ReleaseFeatureResponse.description: One change bullet inside a release note.

id.title: Id
id.description: Stable id for detail routes and React row keys (e.g. date or version slug).

version.title: Version
version.description: Version label shown in the table badge column.

released_at.title: Released At
released_at.description: Release date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Map to releasedAt in React.

title.title: Title
title.description: Release title shown in the list and detail dialog.

features.title: Features
features.description: Ordered change bullets for the detail dialog.

ReleaseNoteResponse.title: ReleaseNoteResponse
ReleaseNoteResponse.description: Release note group for one deploy/version.

features.text: Add release notes API backed by release.json

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Release notes newest first. Render as a sortable table; open detail dialog by id with features[] bullets and optional type badges.

features.text: Add release notes API backed by release.json

value.title: Value
value.description: Filter value sent back on analytics requests. Warehouses, plants, and users use numeric id strings. Product categories use "category_type|sub_category_type".

label.title: Label
label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

ReportsDropdownOption.title: ReportsDropdownOption
ReportsDropdownOption.description: Dropdown option for report filter controls.

token.title: Token
token.description: Plain reset token from the email magic link (`?token=` query param).

password.title: Password
password.description: New password. Validated with zxcvbn (minimum score 3).

message.title: Message
message.description: Password was updated and all active sessions were revoked.

keep_device_uuids.title: Keep Device Uuids
keep_device_uuids.description: Device UUIDs to keep active; all other active devices are deregistered.

subject.title: Subject
subject.default: Whirlpool Inspection Tool — sample background email

body_text.title: Body Text
body_text.default: This message was sent via the background task queue.

provider.description: SMTP provider: aws_ses, google_workspace, google_workspace_relay, or custom_smtp.

host.title: Host
host.description: SMTP server (swaks --server). Omit to use saved smtp.host.

encryption.description: Must be starttls (swaks --tls on port 25, not implicit SSL).

auth_enabled.title: Auth Enabled
auth_enabled.description: Must be false; gateway does not use SMTP AUTH.

from_email.title: From Email
from_email.description: Sender (swaks --from); omit to use saved smtp.from_email.

from_name.title: From Name
from_name.description: Ignored for gateway test (swaks uses plain --from address only).

ehlo_hostname.title: Ehlo Hostname
ehlo_hostname.description: Optional EHLO/HELO name (swaks --ehlo). Default: domain part of from_email.

SmtpGatewayTestConnectionRequest.title: SmtpGatewayTestConnectionRequest
SmtpGatewayTestConnectionRequest.description:
Internal SMTP gateway test aligned with swaks:
--port 25 --tls --tls-verify --from ... --to ... (no --auth-user).

to_email.title: To Email
to_email.description: Recipient address for the test message.

smtp.description: Optional SMTP settings to test before saving; omit to use credentials.json.

error_trace.title: Error Trace
error_trace.description: Full Python traceback when success is false.

auth_enabled.title: Auth Enabled
auth_enabled.description: When false, SMTP login is skipped (internal relay / gateway).

result_ready.title: Result Ready
result_ready.description: True when the task reached a terminal state (completed, failed, cancelled).

result_success.title: Result Success
result_success.description: True only when status is completed and the handler finished successfully.

result_message.title: Result Message
result_message.description: Short summary when the result is not ready or the task failed.

display_fields.title: Display Fields
display_fields.description: Ordered label/value rows for React detail views.

key.title: Key
key.description: Stable identifier for React list keys.

value.title: Value
value.description: Pre-formatted value safe to render as text.

group.title: Group
group.description: Section hint: status, timing, result, error, or payload.

mobile_number.title: Mobile Number
mobile_number.description: Ten-digit mobile number, unique across users.

role.title: Role
role.description: App role. Superadmin cannot be assigned via this API.

designation.title: Designation
designation.description: Job title shown in the UI.

allowed_warehouse.title: Allowed Warehouse
allowed_warehouse.description: Warehouse codes the user may access. Required for manager and biz-admin.

allowed_plants.title: Allowed Plants
allowed_plants.description: Plant codes the user may access (inbound scope).

email.title: Email
email.description: Email from the rejected row (may be invalid).

role.title: Role
role.description: Role label from the rejected row.

allowed_warehouse.title: Allowed Warehouse
allowed_warehouse.description: Allowed Warehouse cell from the rejected row.

success.title: Success
success.description: True when the upload finished without a fatal error.

updated.title: Updated
updated.description: Number of existing users updated by email.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.description: Number of rows rejected due to validation or conflicts.

rejected_rows.title: Rejected Rows
rejected_rows.description: Rejected rows with the original values and a reason.

rejected_csv.title: Rejected Csv
rejected_csv.description: CSV text for rejected rows (same columns as the upload plus Error). Save as a .csv file, fix the issues, and re-upload.

action.title: Action
action.description: Whether the row created a new user or updated an existing user by email.

user_uuid.title: User Uuid
user_uuid.description: User to provision. One VPN profile per user.

device_name.title: Device Name
device_name.description: Label on the VPN server. Defaults to the user's name.

device_type.title: Device Type
device_type.description: Device type sent to the VPN provision service.

welcome_email_sent.title: Welcome Email Sent
welcome_email_sent.description: True when the welcome onboarding email was queued or sent.

uuid.title: Uuid
uuid.description: Public user id. Use in paths such as /api/users/{user_uuid}.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role slug: operator, manager, biz-admin, or superadmin.

allowed_warehouse.title: Allowed Warehouse
allowed_warehouse.description: Warehouse codes in scope. Empty for operators without warehouse access.

vpn_device_uuid.title: Vpn Device Uuid
vpn_device_uuid.description: VPN provision device id when a profile exists.

vpn_device_name.title: Vpn Device Name
vpn_device_name.description: VPN device label on the provision server.

vpn_provisioned_at.title: Vpn Provisioned At
vpn_provisioned_at.description: UTC time when the current VPN profile was created.

must_change_password.title: Must Change Password
must_change_password.description: True when the user must set a new password before using the app.

password_expired.title: Password Expired
password_expired.description: True when the password exceeded PASSWORD_MAX_AGE_DAYS and must be rotated.

onboard_email_sent_at.title: Onboard Email Sent At
onboard_email_sent_at.description: UTC time when the welcome onboarding email was last delivered successfully. Null means the user has not received an onboarding email yet.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: User account returned by create, update, list, and VPN provision endpoints.

role.title: Role
role.description: App role. Superadmin cannot be assigned.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Set false to deactivate the user (soft delete). Also revokes their VPN profile when VPN was provisioned.

allowed_warehouse.title: Allowed Warehouse
allowed_warehouse.description: Replaces warehouse scope when provided. Omit to keep existing.

allowed_plants.title: Allowed Plants
allowed_plants.description: Replaces plant scope when provided. Omit to keep existing.

UserUpdateRequest.title: UserUpdateRequest
UserUpdateRequest.description: Body for PUT /api/users/{user_uuid}. Send only fields to change.

can_access_app.title: Can Access App
can_access_app.description: Whether this client may use the application. False when VPN IP allowlisting is configured and the request IP is not allowed.

can_login_multiple_devices.title: Can Login Multiple Devices
can_login_multiple_devices.description: Whether the API allows multiple active device sessions per user. When false, login may require device selection via requires_device_selection.

public_ip_address.title: Public Ip Address
public_ip_address.description: Client IP Address observed by the API.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Endpoints related to authentication, authorization, user login, token management, and access control mechanisms within the system.

tags.name: App
tags.description: Application metadata for authenticated clients: release notes and related dashboard information.
